title: Velvety Australian Cod Soup
description: A silky, savory cod soup infused with Australian aromatics, finished with a swirl of coconut milk and lemon zest for a bright finish.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large pot over medium heat until shimmering.
Add the diced onion, carrot, and celery; sauté for 5 minutes until softened.
Stir in the minced garlic and cook for another 30 seconds until fragrant.
Add the tomato paste, coating the vegetables, and cook for 1 minute to deepen the flavor.
Pour in the fish stock, bring to a gentle boil, then reduce to a simmer for 10 minutes to allow the base to develop.
Gently fold in the cod cubes and simmer for 6-8 minutes, or until the fish is opaque and flakes easily.
Stir in the coconut milk and lemon zest, letting the soup heat through but not boil to preserve the silky texture.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Remove from heat, stir in the fresh dill, and let the soup rest for 2 minutes to meld the flavors.
Serve hot, optionally garnishing with an extra sprinkle of dill or a drizzle of coconut milk.
